description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features two flat, light gray doors with a subtle vertical seam in the center, lacking visible handles for a sleek appearance. The top, sides, and back are finished in a light wood grain texture, giving it a natural yet contemporary look. The back panel has recessed rectangular outlines and two small round fixtures near the bottom, possibly for securing or mounting. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with a hollow interior for storage. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with light gray doors and a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and back. The design is sleek and handleless, suitable for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two flat, light gray doors with a central seam and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous light wood grain texture with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Back view revealing recessed rectangular outlines and two small round fixtures at the bottom, all in light wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with uninterrupted light wood grain texture.
